$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the void — nothing here but focus.
Hey. Pure grid, pure quiet. Wander as far as you like.
Glad you came. Sometimes empty space is the point.
Welcome in. No distractions out here — just you.
guide-wait: Take your time — I'll wait on the grid.
No rush. There's nowhere to be but here.
I'll hold this spot until you catch up.
guide-arrive: This is {landmark}, such as it is.
